<a id="class-bus-manager"></a>

# BUS_MANAGER

**Inherits:** `Node`

Audio bus and FX helper for DJ controller runtime Keeps bus names/slots aligned with Main Audio Bus Layout V2.tres.

## Properties

| `bool`                                                   | [ONE_FX_AT_A_TIME](#class-bus-manager-property-one-fx-at-a-time)                                             | `true`   |
|----------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|
| [E_Track_FX_Policy](#enum-bus-manager-e-track-fx-policy) | [CURRENT_TRACK_FX_POLICY](#class-bus-manager-property-current-track-fx-policy)                               | `0`      |
| [E_BEAT_FX_TYPE](#enum-bus-manager-e-beat-fx-type)       | [active_effects_Channel_1](#class-bus-manager-property-active-effects-channel-1)                             | `{}`     |
| [E_BEAT_FX_TYPE](#enum-bus-manager-e-beat-fx-type)       | [active_effects_Channel_2](#class-bus-manager-property-active-effects-channel-2)                             | `{}`     |
| Array[`float`]                                           | [\_pitch_shift_scale_override_by_channel](#class-bus-manager-property-pitch-shift-scale-override-by-channel) | `[...]`  |

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-bus-manager-method-allow-multiple-fx-at-same-time"></a>

`bool` **Allow_Multiple_FX_at_same_time**()  [🔗](#class-bus-manager-method-allow-multiple-fx-at-same-time)

Returns true when stacking more than one beat FX at once is allowed.

---

<a id="class-bus-manager-method-set-allow-multiple-fx-at-same-time"></a>

 **Set_Allow_Multiple_FX_at_same_time**(enabled: `bool`)  [🔗](#class-bus-manager-method-set-allow-multiple-fx-at-same-time)

Enables or disables beat FX stacking mode.

---

<a id="class-bus-manager-method-toggle-allow-multiple-fx-at-same-time"></a>

`bool` **Toggle_Allow_Multiple_FX_at_same_time**()  [🔗](#class-bus-manager-method-toggle-allow-multiple-fx-at-same-time)

false means we cant do multiple FX at the same time now

<a id="class-bus-manager-method-apply-beat-fx-level"></a>

 **Apply_Beat_FX_Level**(channel: `int`, alpha: `float`)  [🔗](#class-bus-manager-method-apply-beat-fx-level)

Beat FX “power” knob: alpha 0 = no audible effect (like off), alpha 1 = full effect. Call every frame from Controller

---

<a id="class-bus-manager-private-method-set-beat-fx-effect-level"></a>

 **\_set_beat_fx_effect_level**(effect: `AudioEffect`, fx_type: [E_BEAT_FX_TYPE](#enum-bus-manager-e-beat-fx-type), alpha: `float`, channel: `int` = 0)  [🔗](#class-bus-manager-private-method-set-beat-fx-effect-level)

Per-effect “amount” so that alpha 0 = inaudible, alpha 1 = full. Effect-specific parameter scaling
